title: cytisus hirsutus subsp. alpestris
intro: Cytisus hirsutus subsp. alpestris, also known as the alpine broom, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been employed in the treatment of various health issues, such as digestive problems, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits. The alpine broom can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Cytisus hirsutus subsp. alpestris as a medicinal plant.
